nasb.text: Suddenly Babylon has fallen and been broken; Wail over her! Bring balm for her pain; Perhaps she may be healed.

esv.text: Suddenly Babylon has fallen and been broken; wail for her! Take balm for her pain; perhaps she may be healed.

cnv.text: 巴比倫必突然傾覆毀滅， 你們要為它哀號！ 拿乳香來消除它的痛楚， 也許可以治好它。

ccb.text: 转瞬之间，巴比伦必毁灭。 你们要为她哀悼， 拿药为她止痛， 或许可以治好她。
